### last time

*  heap structure
   *  metadata to track available objects
   *  often kept within free regions of memory
   *  commonly contains pointers
*  pointer subterfuge using linked list of free objects
*  double-free vulnerabilities

### assignment Q+A

### quiz

# double-free {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_double-free.qmd >}}

## exercise {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /overflow-heap/_double-free-exer.qmd >}}

{{< include /overflow-int/_talk-inner.qmd >}}

### finding exploits

{{< include /testing/_talk-inner.qmd >}}

{{< include /symbolic/_talk-inner.qmd >}}
